'''Calast''' was a civilian [[Golan Space Colony 2]] [[Space station/Legends|space station]] in the [[Calast system/Legends|Calast system]].

==History==
After the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]], [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] forces [[Rescue at Bundil II|attacked]] the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|''Dreadnaught''-class heavy cruiser]] ''[[VTR-LX]]'' when it was refueling at Calast station. The cruiser was transporting prisoners from [[Echo Base/Legends|Echo Base]] to the [[Bundil II]] station.

{{Station-stub}}

==Routes==
*[[C-3 passenger liner]] ''[[Emza]]''
*C-3 passenger liner ''[[Queen Anig]]''

*Ferryboat liner ''[[Pulsar Lines]]''
*[[Action VI bulk transport/Legends|Action VI transport]] ''[[The Seeker]]''
*[[MB-C1 medium transport]] [[Merr-Sonn (transport group)|''Merr-Sonn'']]
*[[Star Galleon-class frigate|''Star Galleon''-class frigate]] [[Aratech (Star Galleon-class)|''Aratech'']]
*[[Xiytiar-class heavy transport/Legends|Xiytiar-class transport]] ''[[Prax Inc]]''

==Appearances==
